-"the machine"
-30 minutes to death
-there is a machine on your base on mars keeping everyone alive
-there is a malfunction that causes it to lose its energy reserves and everyone will die in 30 minutes if you dont find a way to power it
-kinf of like factorio you need to automate energy by ex mine coal -> blast furnace -> crusher -> machine

-two scenes, game scene and menu scene
-inspired by into the breach, factorio, and rain world (mix of graphics and not pixel perfect effects

machine attribs
-oxygen
-temperature
-power

-machine core time remaining: 23::47

- Events
-along with the timer that is counting down for the machine there is also an upticking event timer
-as the timer gets higher events get more common and dangerous events happen more frequently
-events have levels which changes how they interact with your map
-Events ideas:
    -dust storm (solar panels produce alot less power) you need backup batteries/generators
    -heat wave (machines can overheat and must have cooling, cooling systems use more power) -> cooling towers / heat sinks
    -ice storm (pipes freeze, water production for cooling is reduced, the speed at whcih resources travle through pipes is reduced) -> insulated pipes (upgrade), heating systems
    -cold snap (heating uses extra machine powrr, you need insolation or more power)
    -galagatha (big scary monster do dad)
    -meteor shower (destroyes a number of tiles depending on timer unless protected) -> shield layer goes on top of other layer and will tak one blow from a meteor (level 2 meteors will get through so you have to upgrade, also heigher level buildings, random damage)
    -reactor instability
    -resource contamination
    -humidity (food resources rot faster, you need better refridgeration)
    -solar flare (solar panels that are up to the same level gain double the energy, if they are less than 1 level belo level than they can get blown out)
    -drought (all vegetaton stops growing for a while)
    -earthquake (connected machines can disconnect)
    -radiation spike ()
    -oxygen leak, open flame stats are lesened 

WARNING: 
Dust storm detected

TIels:

-generator (input: feul, output: electricity)
-battery (stores electricity)
-solar panel (input: luminosity value * size(level) - overcast, output: electricity)
-tranformer (allows power not to overload?)

-mining drill (extracts iron / coal/ uranium and silicon from a tile, uses power)
-pump (extracts water / coolant / uses minimal power)
-crusher (ore -> powder, uses power)
-furnace (ore -> metal, uses power + fuel / heat)
-oxygen generator (NASA MOXIE, input water, output oxygen)
-cooling tiles (absorbs heat, has a capacity)
-cooling tower(removes heat, uses water + power)
-radiator (weak free cooling)

-control computer (simple commands, uses power)-> (if [battery] [<20%] [disable] [mining]>)
-drone station (4 drones + 2 each level, lots of power)
-AI core (faster machines (ex 20%) better efficiency, lots of power, alos can cause AI Events)

-reinforced foundation, orevents earthquakes
-shielding, blocks meteors = to level

(in a direction)
-wires (moves power, has capacity of current (too many items plugged into the outlet))
-pipes (moves water)
-conveyor (moves resources)
-power lines (requires tower)

-storage (stores materials, can get clogged)

eather system like BOTW where just simple stuff like cloudy, rainy etc



CONTROLS

-based on factorio
-WASD to move
-R to rotate
-E to select and open inventroy screen
-F to center whole world in window
-ALT toggle additional info mode




everything is on one layer



MAIN MENU
-play
-continue
